blocks.text: Good catch on the FAQ. I have folded the transcripts into what I am asking Robert Smith for, so it is one request and not two, and I used the turnover point as the reason we need the board-deck excerpts sooner rather than later. He should not push back on any of it.

The turnover-versus-operational split is worth building the outline around rather than treating as a footnote, so I am going to draft the questions in two tracks and let Kimberly Le decide which one the evidence actually supports once the {{fact:f:E-2024-001.client}} archive lands. No sense locking the framing before we have read the internal side.
Can we take thirty minutes toward the end of next week to go over the Gallegos, Pope and Marsh outline together before anything reaches Robert Smith? I would rather we settle it between us first.
